endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/{vaultName}/secrets
endpoints.description: The List operation gets information about the secrets in a vault.  NOTE: This API is intended for internal use in ARM deployments. Users should use the data-plane REST service for interaction with vault secrets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/{vaultName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified secret.  NOTE: This API is intended for internal use in ARM deployments. Users should use the data-plane REST service for interaction with vault secrets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/{vaultName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a secret in a key vault in the specified subscription.  NOTE: This API is intended for internal use in ARM deployments. Users should use the data-plane REST service for interaction with vault secrets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/{vaultName}/secrets/{secretName}
endpoints.description: Update a secret in the specified subscription.  NOTE: This API is intended for internal use in ARM deployments.  Users should use the data-plane REST service for interaction with vault secrets.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETNAME}} with a real secretname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.
